_description: Hub User Work Email Verification Email
_note: Sent when a hub user adds a new work email and needs to verify it with a code
subject: Verify Your Work Email - Vetchium
body_intro: To verify your work email at {{.Domain}}, please enter the code below on Vetchium.
body_expiry: This code will expire in 24 hours.
body_ignore: If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.
